All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

P

parse(String) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
Parses a user-facing coordinate string such as "A5" or "J10" into a Coordinate.
PersistenceException - Exception in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions
Thrown when reading or writing persistence files fails, whether it is the serialized save game or the plain-text player data file.
PersistenceException(String) - Constructor for exception com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.PersistenceException
Creates a new exception with a descriptive message.
PersistenceException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.PersistenceException
Creates a new exception wrapping a lower-level I/O cause.
persistProgress() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Auto saves after every move (human or machine), per the project's HU-5: while the match is GameState.IN_PROGRESS the session is written to disk; once it ends, the save is deleted so "Continue Game" is disabled on the next launch.
pickRandomUnshot(Board) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.strategy.RandomHuntStrategy
Collects every cell on the target board that has not been shot at, then returns one of them chosen uniformly at random.
place(Board) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
Places one ship of every type in the fleet onto board, choosing random orientations and positions while respecting all of Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation)'s validation rules.
PLACEMENT - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.GameState
The human player is placing ships on their own board.
placementController - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
PlacementController - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Drives the ship-placement phase of a match on a single Board / BoardGridView pair.
PlacementController(Board, BoardGridView, ShipTrayView, Button, Button, BoardSpriteLayer) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
PlacementController.CellClickAdapter - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Reacts to a click on a board cell: either picks up a placed ship, or drops the held one.
PlacementController.CellHoverAdapter - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Tracks which cell the mouse is over so rotation (R) can refresh the right preview.
PlacementController.PlacementKeyAdapter - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Rotates or cancels the ship currently held, via the keyboard.
PlacementController.Selection - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Immutable-enough record of what is currently "in hand" while placing.
PlacementController.TraySelectAdapter - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller
Reacts to a click on one of the ten tray entries: picks up that ship type.
PlacementKeyAdapter() - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.PlacementKeyAdapter
 
placeOneShip(Board, ShipType) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.RandomFleetPlacer
Attempts to place a single ship of type on board by trying random positions until Board.placeShip(com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.ShipType, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate, com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.Orientation) accepts one.
placeShip(ShipType, Coordinate, Orientation) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Validates and places a ship of the given type on the board.
playButton - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playButton - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
Player - Class in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities
Base class shared by every kind of player in the game.
Player(String) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Player
Creates a player with the given nickname and an empty board.
Player(String, Board) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Player
Creates a player with the given nickname wrapped around an already-existing board.
PLAYER_FILE_NAME - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence.GamePersistenceManager
File name for the plain-text player record.
PLAYER_WON - Enum constant in enum class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.enums.GameState
The human player sank the entire enemy fleet.
playerBoard - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playerBoardContainer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playerBoardView - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playerNicknameLabel - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playerShipNodes - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
playerSpriteLayer - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
positionAtCell(ImageView, Coordinate) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardSpriteLayer
Translates an ImageView so its top-left corner aligns with the logical cell origin in the overlay layer.
positionSegment(Shape, int, Orientation) - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
previewedCells - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
previousInstructionButton - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
 
processTurnQueue() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Drains GameController.turnQueue, painting a marker for every buffered shot, then auto saves, refreshes the turn indicators, shows the result overlay if the match just ended, or spawns the next MachineTurnThread if it is now the machine's turn.
projectCells(ShipType, Coordinate, Orientation) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Board
Projects the list of coordinates a ship of the given type and orientation would occupy, starting from its head cell.
projectFootprint(ShipType, Coordinate, Orientation) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
Projects the cells a ship would occupy from head without touching the board model — used purely for preview/flash rendering.
